case_title: ROBERT CORBOLOTTI VS. DOUGLAS LYTZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE REMOVED FROM JUDICIAL ARBITRATION. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR JAN-29-2018 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206.
